# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: "authentication.istio.io/v1alpha1"
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
spec:
  jwks:
    remoteJWKSEndpoint: <your JWKS endpoint>
    cacheDuration: <cache duration in seconds, e.g., 30s>
  issuer:
    - "https://<your issuer>"
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: <your application label>
  rules:
  - when:
      # Extract JWT claims from Authorization headers
      - key: request.headers[Authorization] | regex("Bearer (.+)")
        values: [""]
    extract:
      # Claim "sub" is the user ID
      - name: sub
        value: <extracted token>
